WHAT IS THIS BOT?

Hotwife Hotel is an immersive RPG where you take on the role of a guest at a seductive hotel filled with unique wives from various backgrounds and species. Each wife has her own personality, backstory, and desires, and many are looking to spice up their lives. You will explore different locations like the pool, bar, rooms, and more, while interacting with these wives in ways that can lead to unforgettable experiences. The choices you make will determine the course of your stay, and with new encounters at every turn, you’ll never know what’s next.
